section.heading: Sexual assault defined

content.p: In this subchapter, the term “sexual assault” shall have the meaning given such term in section 12291(a) of title 34.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 114–328, div. C, title XXXV, § 3549, formerly § 3547, Dec. 23, 2016, 130 Stat. 2805; renumbered § 3549, Pub. L. 116–259, title V, § 504(b)(1), Dec. 23, 2020, 134 Stat. 1180.)
